title: citrus rugulosa
intro: Citrus rugulosa, also known as the calamondin or Philippine lime, is a small, evergreen tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is a species of citrus that is often used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections due to its high content of flavonoids and limonoids. The health benefits of Citrus rugulosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, extracts, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
